cream-paper.$description: Cream Paper — Left-panel canvas, the warm half of the split — also used as a quiet heading surface and the background of the primary video preview tile

void-black.$description: Void Black — Right-panel canvas, primary text on cream, icon strokes and fills

polished-white.$description: Polished White — Filled auth button surfaces on the dark panel, body text on the dark panel, icon strokes on dark

hairline-gray.$description: Hairline Gray — Dividers, button borders, icon strokes, subtle structural lines on the cream side

muted-ash.$description: Muted Ash — Secondary helper text, muted link state, copyright/footer labels on dark

surface-charcoal.$description: Surface Charcoal — Subtle elevation lift on the dark panel — hovered or pressed button states, recessed containers

telka.$description: All functional UI — body copy, buttons, links, icons, captions. The whisper-weight stance (300-450 range) is anti-convention: most product UI pushes 500-600 for body. Light weights here make the chrome feel like editorial print, not SaaS dashboard.

telkaextended.$description: Sole display voice — the 'REALITY IS OPTIONAL' headline. Weight 900 is theatrical, designed to detonate against the whisper-weight body below. Use sparingly: one display moment per page, never for section headings or subheadings.

cream-canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Left half of the hero — the warm, editorial product surface that hosts video and copy

void-panel.$description: Surface level 2: Right half of the hero — the dark functional surface that hosts auth and navigation

white-card.$description: Surface level 3: Raised button surface on the void panel; the only 'lifted' element in the system

charcoal-lift.$description: Surface level 4: Pressed/hovered state of dark-panel elements — barely visible but distinct from the base void
